description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a pip cache at .cache/pip via the PIP_CACHE_DIR variable and sets PROTOCOL_BUFFERS_PYTHON_IMPLEMENTATION and PYTHONUNBUFFERED. Add a findout job using the python:3.9-buster image, limited to the findout branch, that runs pwd, cd .., pwd, ls -al and printenv. Add Python version jobs (3.10, 3.11, 3.12, 3.13, 3.8, 3.9) each using the corresponding python:<version>-slim image, limited to the master branch and their version‑specific tags, with a before_script that creates an ubuntu user, updates apt, installs build‑essential, zlib1g-dev, git, PostgreSQL (creates database skitai and user skitai), installs libgl1‑mesa‑glx, installs TensorFlow‑CPU and Keras versions, installs typing_extensions, grpcio, protobuf, clones and installs atila and rs4 from GitLab, installs remaining requirements from tools/benchmark/requirements.txt and tests/requirements.txt, and finally runs the shared test script (cd tests, chown to ubuntu, ./test-all.sh --disable-pytest-warnings). Include a python 3.12 job that also installs aiohttp==3.9.0b0 and uses TensorFlow‑CPU 2.16.1 with Keras 3.0.0, and a python 3.13 job that installs aiohttp==3.9.0b0 without TensorFlow. Add a python pypy3 job using the pypy:slim image, limited to the pypy branch, that replaces the system python with pypy3, installs libpq-dev, psycopg2cffi, then runs the same before_script steps and shared test script.
